title: CobbleMaster
description: The official Cobblemon: Mega Showdown modpack — competitive battles, tech automation, and endless exploration, all in one.
body:
# ⚔️ CobbleMaster

> **The ultimate Cobblemon experience.** Battle with Mega Evolutions, build with Create, automate with Mekanism, and explore a world that never runs out of things to do.

---

## 🌟 What is CobbleMaster?

CobbleMaster is a full-featured Cobblemon modpack that combines competitive Pokémon mechanics, deep tech progression, stunning visuals, and a richly decorated world — all in one carefully curated package. Whether you're hunting shinies, setting up a fusion reactor, or challenging trainers with a full Mega Evolution team, CobbleMaster has you covered.

---

## ⚡ Features

### 🏆 Competitive Pokémon
Full implementation of every major battle mechanic from the mainline games:
- **Mega Evolutions** — all megas included
- **Z-Moves, Dynamax & Gigantamax**
- **Terastallization & Ultra Burst**
- **Fusions & Form Changes**
- Trainer battles, badges, breeding, capture XP, and more

### ⚙️ Tech & Automation
A complete tech stack for players who love to engineer:
- **Create** + a suite of addons (Copycats+, Bells & Whistles, Dreams & Desires, Diesel Generators, Enchantment Industry, and more)
- **Mekanism** + Generators
- **Applied Energistics 2** with Wireless Terminals
- **Immersive Engineering** & **Solar Flux Reborn**

### 🏡 Building & Decoration
Hundreds of new blocks, furniture, and decorative options:
- **Macaw's** full suite — doors, windows, stairs, bridges, fences, paths, furniture, lights, and more
- **Handcrafted**, **Another Furniture**, **Chipped**, **Decocraft**, **CobbleFurnies**, **Stoneworks**
- **Supplementaries**, **Armor Statues**, **Sophisticated Storage** & **Sophisticated Backpacks**

### 🌍 Exploration & World
A world worth exploring:
- **Terralith** + **Biomes O' Plenty** for stunning terrain
- **Serene Seasons** with season HUD
- **Waystones** for fast travel
- **Distant Horizons** for massive view distances
- **JourneyMap** for full mapping

### 🎨 Visuals & Shaders
Look incredible doing it:
- **Complementary Shaders** (Unbound + Reimagined)
- **BSL Shaders**, **Solas**, **Photon Shaders**
- **Iris**, **Sodium**, **Falling Leaves**, **Particle Rain**, **Dynamic FPS**

### 🎮 Quality of Life
A smooth, polished experience:
- **Epic Fight** with Skill Tree and ParCool parkour
- **Simple Voice Chat**, **Emotecraft**, **Ping Wheel**
- **Traveler's Backpack**, **Comforts**, **GraveStone Mod**
- **BetterF3**, **AppleSkin**, **Mouse Tweaks**, **WI Zoom**, and much more

---

## 📦 Modpack Info

| Detail | Info |
|---|---|
| **Minecraft Version** | 1.21.1 |
| **Mod Loader** | NeoForge |
| **Cobblemon Version** | 1.7.3 |
| **Mega Showdown Version** | 1.8.2 |
| **Total Mods** | 200+ |

---

## 🚀 Installation

1. Download and install the **Modrinth** app
2. Search for **CobbleMaster** or import the modpack file
3. Launch and enjoy!

---

*CobbleMaster is a modpack built around [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com) and [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-mega-showdown). All included mods remain the property of their respective authors.*
